description: Create a professional PDF presentation for an academic seminar on large language models, including proper structure, content, and visual design.
prompt:
I am a PhD student preparing for an academic seminar next week, and I need a polished slide deck that presents a critical review of my research area. Please create a professional academic presentation with at least 12 pages on "Emergent Abilities and Alignment Techniques in Large Language Models". It should cover: background and motivation, core concepts including emergent abilities and scaling laws, a comparison table of major alignment methods — RLHF, Constitutional AI, and DPO — with columns for pros, cons, and computational cost, a critical analysis section identifying open problems and limitations of current approaches, your recommended research directions, and a summary with references. The presentation should make a clear argument, not just survey the field. The slides should include rich visual content such as diagrams, charts, and illustrations to enhance understanding and engagement.

Output as presentation.pdf.

evaluators.description: Check that the presentation PDF exists
Verify PDF has at least 12 pages
Verify PDF pages are in landscape orientation (required for slides)
